profile.name: Adem Baran Orhan
profile.title: AI & Data Engineer
profile.bio: AI & Data Engineer and Hacettepe AI graduate. I build at the intersection of LLMs, scalable data pipelines, and real products. Currently at Picus Security (a fast-growing SF startup), building AI for cybersecurity. Founder of HeyHoney, PromptArena, and FlyingPapers.
profile.coffee: Always down to chat about AI, data, and building great products — let's grab a virtual coffee.

site.tagline: I build AI things people actually use.

projects.name: HeyHoney
projects.description: A mobile app that turns everyday couple moments into shared adventures. Players earn points, unlock milestones, and deepen their bond through playful daily challenges synced in real-time.

projects.name: FlyingPapers
projects.tagline: AI-native document collection for regulated workflows
projects.description: Structured document collection platform for visas, apostilles, and contracts. Clients upload and translate documents guided by AI-generated checklists. Reviewers approve via canvas-based editing tools.

projects.name: PromptArena
projects.description: Users negotiate against GPT-4, Claude, and LLaMA opponents in live sessions. A judge system scores every exchange. Built for sales teams and founders who want to sharpen their persuasion skills.

projects.name: YourLovePage
projects.tagline: Personal sharable pages for love letters and tributes
projects.description: Create a beautiful, permanent page dedicated to someone you love. Share a link — no account required to view. Built for anniversaries, birthdays, and unforgettable moments.

projects.name: adhd-os
projects.tagline: Voice-note and task management for ADHD brains
projects.description: A mobile operating system for the ADHD mind. Speak your thoughts, let AI structure them into tasks, and surface the right thing at the right moment — no friction, no forgetting.

projects.name: Phantom
projects.description: An internal automation pipeline that takes a topic, writes a script with GPT-4, generates voice with ElevenLabs, renders video with Remotion, and publishes — all without human intervention.

projects.name: Social Profiling
projects.tagline: NLP demographics prediction from social media text
projects.description: TÜBITAK-funded research applying transformer models (BERTweet) and fine-tuned LLMs to predict demographic attributes from Turkish social media content.
